tracker.moderateStatus: 🟡 Moderate Activity - Stay Alert for Roaming Gankers
tracker.extremeStatus: 🔴 EXTREME DANGER - Peak Time for PvP & Guild Wars!

hero.title: Albion Online Farming Guide
hero.description: Master the ultimate gathering tradecraft from beginner zones to elite Tier 8 Outlands. Tailored strictly for the Asia server ecosystem with step-by-step progress lanes.

builds.title: ⚔️ Recommended Escape Configurations
builds.description: Optimize your gear specifications to survive ambush parameters and slip away seamlessly from gank networks.

biomes.title: Biome Matrices & Capital Logistics
biomes.description: Each major capital city features custom localized refining multipliers and resource weights. Anchor your operations appropriately.

biome_descriptions.swamp: Misty wetlands rich with organic Fiber crops. Perfect for weavers looking for refining bonuses.
biome_descriptions.forest: Dense primal forests hosting towering ancient trees for high-yield Wood logging industries.
biome_descriptions.mountain: Frozen, dangerous mountaintops packed full of premium hard metal deposits and Ore veins.
biome_descriptions.highland: Steep rocky crags providing absolute abundance of Stone foundation building blocks.
biome_descriptions.steppe: Sunburnt dry plateaus where dangerous fauna roam. Prime territory for Hide skinning operations.

tiers.title: Gathering Tier Progression Grid
tiers.description: Sequential roadmap mapping gathering zones from absolute security to full lawless environments.

tips: Focus on leveling all fundamental tool archetypes from T1 to T4 without hesitation.
CRITICAL: Do NOT spend Learning Points on T1-T3 nodes. Keep them for Tier 4+ thresholds!
Gather anything in sight to build mechanical comfort with nodes.

tier4.location: Royal Continent - Neighboring Yellow & Red Gates
tier4.zoneType: Yellow Zone (Knockdown Only - Safe from Full Loot)
tips: Equip specialized T4 Gathering Apparel immediately for output yield multipliers.
Always consume Pork Pie to optimize packing weight and striking speeds.
Hostile actions here only trigger knockdowns; you will not drop inventory upon defeat.

tier5.zoneType: Red Zone (Full Loot PvP - High Hostility)
tips: CRITICAL DIRECTIVE: Ban the use of Ox mounts here! If dismounted by hostiles, your weight will spike to 100%+, locking your escape options.
Transition immediately to a T4 Riding Stag or T5 Horse to maintain character-bound weight parameters.
Monitor the local hostile player counter located explicitly at the bottom-right corner of your minimap.
Drink from the Invisibility Shrine found immediately inside the main city portal hall before stepping outside.
Never farm the direct exit map of the portal; travel 2-3 maps deep to bypass portal campers.
Keep your mount circle within click range at all times during node harvesting.

tier7.location: Deep Outlands - High Tier Black Matrix
tips: Utilize Roads of Avalon portals as secret bypass vectors for emergency extractions or rare node discoveries.
Solo operators should look for Gold Mist wisps; pocket dimensions offer safer environments than open maps.
Maintain high-tier active inventory slots containing Invisibility Potions at all times.

tier8.location: Central Outlands - Primal Deep Black Zone
tips: T8 nodes spawn near Guild Watchtower territories. Heavily contested by major alliances.
Farming here requires a protective alliance presence or operation during designated Low Activity hours.
Premium anti-gank mounts like the Pest Lizard or Swamp Salamander are mandatory to survive coordinated chases.

t8Maps.title: T8 Resource Strategic Coordinates
t8Maps.description: Verified map labels where Tier 8 pure material configurations spawn inside the lawless Black Zones.

events.title: 📅 Asia Server Operational Event Cadence
events.description: Align your farming activity loops with major server events to stay clear of localized battlefield groups.
events.worldBossDesc: Spawns every even hour UTC (00:00, 02:00, 04:00, etc.) on the Asia cluster to circumvent daily maintenance down times.
events.worldBossNote: High cluster density. Avoid solo gathering near these sectors during active spawn periods.
events.primeTimeDesc: Runs from 13:00 - 15:00 UTC (8 PM - 10 PM WIB). Absolute peak convergence for massive guild battles.
events.primeTimeNote: Extreme threat level for solo entities. Highly advised to stick to safe rings or log off.
events.dangerWindowDesc: Active windows where specialized hunter crews (5-10 players) sweep deep black zones with catching nets.
events.dangerWindowNote: Always play with high directional volume to catch off-screen mount hoof sounds early.
events.lowActivityDesc: From 21:00 to 09:00 UTC (Morning to Afternoon WIB). Most Asia server users are offline for school or corporate work.
events.lowActivityNote: The ultimate peaceful window to secure massive millions of Silver profits in deep zones completely unbothered.

efficiency.title: Efficiency Directives
tips: Focus exclusively on ONE resource type until you hit T8 unlock thresholds before diversifying. Speed up your economic baseline.
Always consume Pork Pie before engagement with a node; resource yield bonuses grant completely free materials.
Apply Learning Points ONLY to bypass the final 20% exp wall of the primary tool tier upgrades.
efficiency.radiantTip: 💡 Patch Update: Leverage the brand-new 'Loot All' button system from the Radiant Wilds build for ultra-fast pve collection!

safety.title: Survival Protocols
tips: Keep your mouse cursor positioned natively near your mount silhouette. Remount immediately upon seeing red names.
Rely heavily on specialized escape skills on gathering boots (e.g., Miner Workboots possess the highest speed burst).
Avoid traveling inside standard straight dirt pathways; gank crews routinely pitch blockades there.

profitability.title: Market Profit Dynamics
tips: Stone: Extremely low competition metrics currently; excellent stable value for high-tier guild structures.
Fisherman: High cash-flow predictability anywhere with deep water bodies; entirely detached from node respawn bottlenecks.
Ore & Hide: Commands premium Silver price points at central markets; heavily contested maps with high threat indices.

footer.text: Albion Online Farming Guide 2026 • Optimized Static Build for Cloudflare Pages Deployment
footer.author: Creative Engine Architect: ABID

early_game.title: 🌱 Comprehensive Early Game Guide (The Foundation Era)
early_game.description: Crucial initial operations for new characters on the Royal Continent to establish their economic engine.

sections.heading: 1. Starting Out at the Starter Cross Zones
sections.content: Upon completing the tutorial, you will land in a small outpost (e.g., Swamp Cross, Forest Cross). Gather Tier 1 and Tier 2 raw resources here with basic tier tools until you can unlock Tier 3 options. Do not linger in these starter zones longer than necessary.

sections.heading: 2. The Golden Rule of Learning Points (LP)
sections.content: CRITICAL: Never allocate your scarce Learning Points (LP) to unlock Tier 2 or Tier 3 harvesting tools. Let the progression bar fill organically up to the 20% mark. Lock your LP exclusively for Tier 4, Tier 5, and subsequent massive tier jumps where the raw exp requirement escalates exponentially.

sections.heading: 3. Sampling All Node Types
sections.content: Purchase all variant Tier 3 tools (Axe, Pickaxe, Skinning Knife, Sickle, Stone Hammer). Spend time in safe Blue Zones collecting everything. Analyze the market prices and feel the minigame pacing. After this, pick ONE or TWO primary paths. Constantly switching lines will heavily stunt your journey to end-game wealth.

sections.heading: 4. Migration to Major Capital Hubs
sections.content: Each primary city boasts native industry bonuses. Move your operations to Fort Sterling if you choose Ore mining, or Lymhurst if you pursue Logging. Store all your initial asset pools in that city's bank vault; it will serve as your command base.

mid_game.title: ⚔️ Mid Game Transition Blueprint (Entering Lethal Rings)
mid_game.description: How to transition safely from secure regions into Red and Black Zones while generating millions in liquid Silver.

sections.heading: 1. Decommissioning the Ox Mount
sections.content: The number one downfall of mid-game players is taking a Transport Ox into full-loot maps due to inventory greed. Ox mounts use a passive load weight system tied directly to their active presence. If you are dismounted or forced off by a gank squad, your active load instantly spikes to 150%+, pinning your character to the ground. Switch to a T4 Riding Stag or T5 Armored Horse which utilizes independent character load weights.

sections.heading: 2. Reading the Hostile Minimap Metric
sections.content: When traversing Royal Continent Red Zones, check the specific numeric indicator at the bottom-right of your UI. This lists exactly how many flagged criminal players are active in that zone. If the counter sits above zero, exercise extreme caution. If it spikes rapidly, remount and change maps immediately.

sections.heading: 3. Master the Outlands Portal Invisibility Loop
sections.content: When stepping into Black Zones from capital portal rooms, interact directly with the Invisibility Shrines placed at the chamber exits. This grants long-lasting stealth and speed immunities, providing ample runway to drive away from portal-choke blockades routinely pitched by gank gangs.

sections.heading: 4. Consumable Management: Pork Pies & Invisibility Pots
sections.content: Never venture out without active food buffs from Pork Pies to maximize gathering yields. Equip an Invisibility Potion in your active utility slot. If spotted on foot, break line of sight using weapon dash mechanics, chug the potion, and break away at sharp 90-degree angles to completely break tracking paths.

end_game.title: ☠️ End Game Outlands Dominance Guide (T7-T8 Hegemony)
end_game.description: High-tier deep lawless operations inside the core zone ring to extract extreme tier wealth in coordination with guild networks.

sections.heading: 1. Navigating Deep Lawless Clusters
sections.content: Tier 7 and Tier 8 materials only generate in deep Outlands territories. These sectors are fully lawless and dominated by coordinated alliance armies (Zergs). You must read the local map sovereignty to understand alliance political boundaries before harvesting.

sections.heading: 2. Leveraging Watchtower Territories
sections.content: The highest tier node concentrations spawn directly inside active Guild Watchtower perimeters. Joining an alliance that owns these teritories provides a major safety umbrella, as the stationary towers will target and blast outside gank squads trying to breach your position.

sections.heading: 3. Investing in Anti-Gank Luxury Mounts
sections.content: Cheap mounts are unviable in central sectors. Allocate capital for a Pest Lizard or Swamp Salamander. The Pest Lizard is exceptionally powerful: its movement speeds do not decay when receiving combat hits from world mobs or initial player attacks, and its passive traits disrupt lock-on targets.

sections.heading: 4. Deep Avalon Road Sub-Sectors
sections.content: Keep an eye out for deep green or blue Roads of Avalon portals. Avalon dimensions house massive static resource guardians (Resource Aspects) that grant hundreds of raw hits upon collapse. Avalon also functions as an unpredictable, safe emergency extraction wormhole back to the Royal Continent.

miner.title: ⛏️ Profession Core: The Ore Miner Mastery
miner.description: Deep tactical routes for mining valuable high-market shiny metals from mountain ranges.

sections.heading: Core Resource & Biome Mapping
sections.content: Your primary target matrix is Ore veins. Your primary bases of operation are Fort Sterling (Mountain biome) for high density nodes, and Martlock (Highland biome) for secondary veins. Ore nodes display as glowing copper, iron, or titanium stone clusters.

sections.heading: The Power of Miner Garb Skill Sets
sections.content: The Miner Workboots feature the legendary active skill called 'Flee'. This provides the single fastest running velocity burst across the entire game ecosystem at the cost of combat actions. It is your absolute get-out-of-jail-free card when cornered by catching configurations.

sections.heading: Tactical Advice
sections.content: Always carry the highest tier pickaxe available. In mountain clusters, watch out for ice elemental mobs which can be skinned after destruction for massive bonus mining exp pools.

lumberjack.title: 🪓 Profession Core: The Lumberjack Core Guide
lumberjack.description: Mastering the logging and timber industries across thick woodland territories.

sections.heading: Core Resource & Biome Mapping
sections.content: Your target line is Wood logs. Anchor your storage loops in Lymhurst (Forest biome) for core operations, and use Thetford (Swamp biome) as an alternate lane. Wood maintains permanent market demands due to bow, staff, and territory building construction pipelines.

sections.heading: Lumberjack Defense Metrics
sections.content: The Lumberjack attire path features defense armor skills that continuously compound physical armor values while in active motion, preventing long-range slowing arrows from crippling your escape speeds.

sections.heading: Tactical Advice
sections.content: High-tier T7/T8 trees have easily readable gigantic proportions on Outlands maps. Prioritize striking nodes wrapped in green (.1), blue (.2), or purple (.3) aura visual ripples for massive economic profit spikes.

skinner.title: 🔪 Profession Core: The Animal Skinner Path
skinner.description: The highest grossing financial gathering line that requires active mechanical combat execution.

sections.heading: Core Resource & Biome Mapping
sections.content: Your primary target asset is raw Hide leather. The premier hub for skinning operations is Bridgewatch (Steppe biome) followed by Lymhurst (Forest biome). Hides command premium pricing due to the immense popularity of leather armor sets.

sections.heading: The Double Exp Efficiency Loop
sections.content: THE SKINNER SECRET: Unlike other passive extraction professions, a Skinner must actively slaughter dangerous fauna before skinning can take place. This ensures your character extracts massive Combat Fame along with Gathering Fame simultaneously, doubling character progression speed.

sections.heading: Tactical Advice
sections.content: Utilize weapons with high localized AoE burst damage profiles (e.g., Battleaxe or Deathgivers) to drop animal packs fast before clearing them with a Pork Pie buff active.

harvester.title: 🌿 Profession Core: The Fiber Harvester Blueprint
harvester.description: Harvesting ancient fiber lines across mystical swamp setups.

sections.heading: Core Resource & Biome Mapping
sections.content: Your operational focus is Fiber crops. Anchor your primary market bins inside Thetford (Swamp biome) or Bridgewatch (Steppe biome). Fiber represents the foundation material for all magical cloth armor and specialized capes.

sections.heading: The Harvester Defensive Advantage
sections.content: The Harvester Robe offers access to the 'Windwall' spell. When fleeing pursuit groups, deploy this wind wall barrier directly behind your running lane. Pursuing hostiles hitting the wall are violently deflected away, granting clean gaps to remount safely.

sections.heading: Tactical Advice
sections.content: High-tier Fiber crops routinely grow on isolated mini-islands hidden inside deep swamp lagoons. Scout water margins to find unguarded T8 purple nodes.

fisherman.title: 🎣 Profession Core: The Master Fisherman Lane
fisherman.description: A completely isolated, peaceful trade path that bypasses traditional node extraction competition entirely.

sections.heading: Core Mechanics & Water Mapping
sections.content: Fishermen are entirely untethered from rigid node coordinates. Any water body (city ponds, deep oceans, black swamp channels) can be fished. It utilizes an independent leveling grid paired with a mouse-balancing mechanical minigame.

sections.heading: Advanced Profit Processing Chains
sections.content: Never sell raw fish direct to buyers. Maximize liquid returns via three pathways: 1) Chop catches at butcher stalls into 'Chopped Fish' for culinary ingredients, 2) Harvest Seaweed to cook advanced fish sauces, or 3) Eat rare species to instantly inject fishing mastery exp into your grid.

sections.heading: Mandatory Fisherman Loadouts
sections.content: Always coat lines with Fishing Bait to reduce hook delay windows. Equip full Fisherman oilskins because the passive traits accelerate fish pulling mechanics by up to 50% instantly.

equipment_progression.title: 🛡️ Strategic Equipment & Gathering Gear Progression Timeline
equipment_progression.description: An exhaustive technological evolution chart mapping tools, armors, escapes, and mounts from novice rings to elite black setups.

nodes.title: Basic Gathering & Safety Incubation
nodes.focus: Maxing out basic tool proficiencies within safe Royal Continent boundaries.
items: Acquire standard T2 through T4 harvesting tools matching your target trade.
Buy a full set of T4 Gathering Gear (Cap, Garb, Workboots) the moment the skill node hits 100% to activate yield multiplier percentages.
Transport Ox mounts are fully acceptable here; large load tolerances optimize safe zone loops where items cannot be lost upon defeat.
Keep baseline T4 Pork Pies active to compound basic striking frequencies.

nodes.title: Lethal Zone Transition & Tactical Evasion Gear
nodes.focus: Prioritizing active character survival metrics over raw inventory space limitations.
items: T5/T6 Specialized Tools (Incorporate Enchanted tool modifications if Silver capital permits).
BANISH THE TRANSPORT OX: Transition completely to a T4 Riding Stag or T5 Armored Horse. This isolates your item weight parameters from mount states.
Equip Escape Weapons: A T4+ Bloodletter paired with an off-hand Mistcaller (minimizes skill cooldown clocks), or a Double Bladed Staff for dual long-range jump capabilities.
Slot an active Invisibility Potion into your hotkey dashboard for immediate split-second tracking breaks.

nodes.title: Elite Gatherer Hegemony Configurations
nodes.focus: Extracting maximum financial returns in central lawless zones under permanent apex danger indicators.
items: Pure Tier 7 or Tier 8 Primary Extraction Tools (Upgrade to Avalonian variant tools if you can absorb high replacement capital costs).
Full Master tier T7/T8 Gathering Gear Sets generating maximum yield bonuses.
Elite Mount Requirements: Pest Lizard or Swamp Salamander. The lizard boasts unmatched consistency, refusing to drop speeds when receiving combat slowing strikes.
Consume Avalonian Pork Pies when stripping shiny high-enchanted nodes (.2/.3) to trigger massive price windfalls at major auction houses.
